name: Financial Modeling Prep MCP Server
what_it_does: Financial Modeling Prep (FMP) MCP server enabling AI agents to access comprehensive financial data — stock prices, financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow), financial ratios, earnings data, company profiles, insider transactions, and macroeconomic indicators from FMP's financial data API. Enables agents to perform financial analysis and research.
use_cases: Querying company financial statements and metrics from financial analysis agents
Fetching stock price history and technical indicators from trading research agents
Analyzing earnings reports and analyst estimates from investment research agents
Screening stocks by financial ratios from portfolio management agents
Monitoring insider trading activity from market intelligence agents
Accessing macroeconomic data for context from economic analysis agents
not_for: Real-time trading execution (FMP provides data, not trading capabilities)
High-frequency trading requiring tick-by-tick data (FMP is for fundamental analysis, not HFT)
Free unlimited financial data — FMP has tier-based access; premium data requires paid plan
best_when: A financial analysis agent needs fundamental stock data — financial statements, ratios, and company metrics for investment research. FMP provides comprehensive fundamental data at lower cost than Bloomberg/Refinitiv.
avoid_when: You need real-time tick data, options chains, or derivatives data — FMP focuses on fundamental data. For real-time market data, use data vendors with appropriate licensing.

auth.notes: FMP API key required. Set FMP_API_KEY environment variable. Get key from financialmodelingprep.com. Free tier includes basic data; premium endpoints require paid plan.

pricing.free_tier_limits: FMP free tier: 250 API calls/day, limited to basic endpoints
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter: $19/month; Basic: $79/month; Premium: $179/month for full data access
pricing.notes: Free tier is limited in calls and endpoints. Full financial data coverage requires paid plan. FMP is much cheaper than Bloomberg Terminal but provides comparable fundamental data.

performance.rate_limits: 250 calls/day (free); higher limits on paid plans

known_agent_gotchas: Free tier's 250 calls/day depletes quickly in agent loops — monitor usage carefully
Not all financial data endpoints are available on free tier — verify endpoint availability for your plan
Financial data has temporal delays — not suitable for real-time trading decisions
Data coverage is primarily US equities; international coverage is more limited
Community MCP — test API response formats against your expected schema before relying on
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API key auth. Financial data queries — data is public market information. Keep API key secure. FMP data is for informational use — verify licensing for commercial applications.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Public financial data. Keep key secure. Verify FMP data licensing for commercial financial applications.
